flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Chesapeake College are 18% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($36.3k vs $44.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Chesapeake College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.4k → $8.8k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Chesapeake College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (54.8% → 63.2%).
